title: Alaticaulia helgae
taxonomy: Alaticaulia helgae is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. This family consists of succulent plants, many of which are native to southern Africa. Alaticaulia helgae is a relatively rare and endemic species found in the Western Cape province of South Africa. The classification of Alaticaulia helgae is further detailed at the genus level, with Alaticaulia being part of the subfamily Ruschioideae. The specific classification of this plant is still being researched and documented by botanists and horticulturists.
